tagline: Turns emotional messes into tiny, useful rituals.

designSystem.style: Warm, playful, and quirky with an earthy orange-amber palette. Features surreal humor through emoji-based goblin characters, rounded card layouts, and gradient CTAs. Balances whimsy with utility — each screen feels approachable rather than clinical.

screens: Home — Daily overview, last caught goblin, quick rituals carousel, weekly pattern peek
Check-in — 4-question metaphor-based mood quiz leading to goblin identification and ritual selection
Goblin Almanac — Weekly calendar heatmap, pattern detection, frequency breakdown per goblin type
Social Scripts — Expandable pre-written scripts for canceling plans, asking for space, defusing tension
Settings — Theme toggle (light/dark), check-in schedule, goblin stats, profile
